blocks.text: Open questions are delegated to [`../../../50-roadmap/open-questions.md`](../../../50-roadmap/open-questions.md). Resolved implementation decisions should move into generated C11 domain docs instead of staying here.

rows: `mac-app-store` external provider CLI execution requires user-selected or sandbox/security-scoped OS grant plus Store review approval; otherwise the provider is store-blocked or demo-only.
`msix-store` uses a packaged full-trust helper/tray process as the local runtime broker; Windows service default install is forbidden.
ConsentLedger durable storage substrate remains a roadmap question: local JSON append log only, OS secure storage, or a hybrid.
Private-source Store App repository ownership is tracked as `Q-CTX-005`; this public daemon doc should not fork that ownership question.
